articles.title_en: Weimob Declares 'AI First' After Crossing ¥100M AI Revenue
articles.title_zh: 微盟 AI 收入破亿后正式推行 AI First 战略
articles.content_en: At its Shanghai summit on April 22, Weimob unveiled an 'AI First' strategy covering AI+SaaS, AI+marketing, AI+overseas expansion, and AI-to-consumer verticals. Its 2025 annual report shows AI-related revenue crossed ¥100M for the first time, with 130% half-on-half growth in H2 2025. The company is rebuilding its architecture around an 'Agent+Skills' model, where natural-language commands replace multi-level backend menus. Its VP of technology flagged a sharp B2B pain point: enterprise clients treat even a single AI error as a systemic failure, making hallucination tolerance near zero.
articles.content_zh: 微盟于4月22日上海峰会正式发布 AI First 战略，覆盖 AI+SaaS、AI+营销、AI+出海及 AI To C 四大方向。2025年财报显示，其 AI 相关收入首次突破亿元，2025年下半年环比增速达130%。技术架构升级为「Agent+Skills」，商家通过自然语言指令直接调取经营数据，取代原有多级菜单操作。技术副总裁肖锋指出，B端客户对 AI 的 hallucination 容忍度接近于零——出现一个 bad case，客户便认为整个 AI 模块不可用。
articles.so_what_en: If you sell AI tools to enterprise clients, set explicit error-rate SLAs and build human-review checkpoints before going live. One public failure resets trust across the entire account.
articles.so_what_zh: 向 B 端销售 AI 工具时，上线前必须设定明确错误率 SLA 并加入人工复核节点，一次 bad case 会让客户否定整个模块。

articles.title_en: Buzzy Raises $20M for AI Video Editing Agent Targeting SMB Marketers
articles.title_zh: Buzzy 获 2000 万美元融资，做面向中小商家的 AI 视频编辑 agent
articles.content_en: Buzzy, built by Beijing-based AI startup Ganzhi Jie (led by ex-Apple/Google hardware and AR engineer Ella Zhang), lets users edit video via natural-language commands: background removal, lighting correction, product replacement, and angle changes — without regenerating the full clip. The company reports $20M ARR and closed a $20M+ Series A led by Redpoint. The pitch is a 'video Photoshop' that handles precise local edits current chat-based AI tools cannot do without resetting the entire frame.
articles.content_zh: Buzzy 由「感知阶跃」（CEO 张诗莹，曾供职 Apple、Google）推出，用户通过自然语言指令对视频执行背景去除、光线修正、产品替换等局部精修，无需重新生成整段画面。公司已实现 2000 万美元 ARR，并完成超 2000 万美元融资，Redpoint 领投。其核心定位是「视频版 Photoshop」，填补现有 AI 编辑器在局部精修上的空白。
articles.so_what_en: Test Buzzy for product video iterations — background swaps and product replacements without reshooting cut per-asset production cost. Compare output quality against your current Runway or Pika workflow before committing budget.
articles.so_what_zh: 评估用 Buzzy 做商品视频局部改版：换背景、换产品无需重拍，可直接对比现有 Runway / Pika 工作流的成本和质量再决定是否切换预算。

articles.title_en: Possible 2026 Expands to Eden Roc, Eyes Davos-Style Marketer Convening
articles.title_zh: Possible 2026 扩张至 Eden Roc，力争成为营销界 Davos
articles.content_en: The Possible conference is expanding beyond the Fontainebleau to the Eden Roc property in 2026, adding invite-only programming, C-suite dealmaking tracks, creator sessions, and AI-focused content. Organizers are positioning it as marketing's premier annual gathering, competing with Cannes Lions for senior executive attention.
articles.content_zh: Possible 大会2026年将场地从 Fontainebleau 扩展至 Eden Roc，新增邀请制高管闭门会、creator 专场及 AI 专题内容，并引入明星资源，目标是成为营销行业的 Davos 级年度峰会，与戛纳狮子节争夺 C-suite 注意力。

articles.title_en: Sports Brands Warned: AI Overuse Risks Disconnecting Fans
articles.title_zh: 品牌被警示：体育营销中过度使用 AI 可能疏远球迷
articles.content_en: Agencies now hiring ex-professional-sports talent are turning sports sponsorships into dedicated business units. However, multiple agency voices told Digiday that deploying AI across too many touchpoints in sports campaigns introduces brand safety risk — replacing the authentic fan connection that makes sports sponsorship valuable in the first place.
articles.content_zh: 多家代理公司正将体育营销从附加项升级为独立业务单元，并从职业体育界招募专业人才。但多名代理商向 Digiday 表示，在体育营销中大量铺设 AI 触点存在品牌安全风险，可能损耗令体育赞助有价值的真实球迷情感连接。
articles.so_what_en: Audit which touchpoints in your sports campaigns are AI-generated. Reserve AI for ops (reporting, trafficking) and keep fan-facing creative human-led.
articles.so_what_zh: 盘点体育营销中哪些触点已交给 AI 生成，将 AI 限制在投放运营层，面向球迷的创意内容保留人工主导。

articles.title_en: Musk vs. Altman Trial Opens April 27: What Marketers Should Watch
articles.title_zh: Musk 诉 Altman 案 4 月 27 日开庭，营销人需关注的信号
articles.content_en: A civil trial between Elon Musk and Sam Altman opens in Oakland on April 27. Musk's claims span breach of contract, unfair business practices, and false advertising against OpenAI. The false-advertising count is the thread most relevant to marketers: how OpenAI publicly describes its mission, product safety, and nonprofit origins could be scrutinized in open court, setting a precedent for AI brand claims.
articles.content_zh: Elon Musk 与 Sam Altman 之间的民事诉讼将于4月27日在加州奥克兰开庭，指控涵盖违约、不正当商业行为及虚假广告三项。其中虚假广告指控与营销人关系最直接：OpenAI 对自身使命、产品安全性及非营利起源的公开表述将在法庭上受到审查，可能为 AI 品牌宣传主张树立先例。

articles.title_en: Local LLM Coders Debate Claude Code vs OpenCode for Qwen 27B Workflows
articles.title_zh: 本地 LLM 开发者热议：Claude Code 还是 OpenCode 驱动 Qwen 27B 编程工作流
articles.content_en: A Reddit thread in r/LocalLLaMA with 58 upvotes and 105 comments is comparing Claude Code and OpenCode as coding agent wrappers for Qwen 3.5/3.6 27B running locally on Linux. Practitioners are evaluating install friction, speed, and bug frequency — signaling that local, cost-free agent coding stacks are becoming a real alternative to cloud-hosted dev tools for resource-conscious teams.
articles.content_zh: Reddit r/LocalLLaMA 上一条获得58票、105条评论的帖子正在对比 Claude Code 与 OpenCode 在 Linux 本地运行 Qwen 3.5/3.6 27B 时的安装难度、速度和 bug 频率。讨论显示，本地化、零云端成本的 agent 编程工作流正成为预算敏感团队替代云端开发工具的真实选项。
articles.so_what_en: If your team uses Claude Code on cloud API, benchmark a local Qwen 27B setup via OpenCode on a spare machine — the cost delta may justify the ops overhead for high-volume content or code generation tasks.
articles.so_what_zh: 若团队在用云端 Claude Code，可在备用机上跑 OpenCode + Qwen 27B 做基准测试，高频内容或代码生成场景下的成本差距可能覆盖运维投入。

articles.title_en: Garry Tan: Open Your Build Loop to Community Feedback
articles.title_zh: Garry Tan：把构建过程开放给社区
articles.content_en: Y Combinator president Garry Tan publicly invited pull requests and issue reports on his own work, and urged founders to share what they are building on JStack. The move treats community critique as a growth input rather than a reputation risk.
articles.content_zh: Y Combinator 总裁 Garry Tan 公开邀请社区对他的工作提交 PR 或 issue，并鼓励创始人在 JStack 上分享正在构建的产品。这种做法把社区批评当作增长信号，而非声誉风险。
articles.so_what_en: Pick one in-progress campaign or product feature and share it publicly this week — ask for critique, not validation. Founder-in-public signals build trust faster than polished launch posts.
articles.so_what_zh: 本周挑一个进行中的产品或活动公开分享，主动征求批评而非赞美。创始人在公众视野中的真实构建过程，比精心准备的发布帖更能积累品牌信任。

articles.title_en: DeepSeek-V4 Ships 1M-Token Context for Production Agents
articles.title_zh: DeepSeek-V4 上线百万 token context window，面向生产级 agent
articles.content_en: DeepSeek released V4 with a 1-million-token context window, posted via Hugging Face on April 24. The jump makes long-document analysis, full-codebase reasoning, and multi-session agent workflows viable without chunking hacks. For AI-native teams currently paying OpenAI or Anthropic for extended context tiers, this is a direct pricing pressure point.
articles.content_zh: DeepSeek 于4月24日通过 Hugging Face 发布 V4，context window 达到100万 token。超长上下文让全文档分析、完整代码库推理、多轮 agent 工作流无需分块处理即可运行。对当前为扩展 context 付费给 OpenAI 或 Anthropic 的团队，这是直接的定价竞争压力。
articles.so_what_en: Benchmark DeepSeek-V4 against your current long-context provider on your actual workload — if quality holds, the cost case for switching is immediate.
articles.so_what_zh: 用真实业务任务对比 DeepSeek-V4 与现有 long-context 供应商，质量达标即可启动迁移评估。

articles.title_en: Browser Harness Strips the Framework, Lets LLM Drive Chrome Freely
articles.title_zh: Browser Harness 移除框架层，让 LLM 直接控制 Chrome
articles.content_en: The team behind the Browser Use library shipped Browser Harness on GitHub (Show HN, April 24). Instead of wrapping Chrome with deterministic heuristics, it hands the LLM direct control and adds self-correction plus on-the-fly tool creation. Marketers building web-scraping or competitor-monitoring agents will find this useful for tasks that break on modal dialogs, cross-origin iframes, and file-download pop-ups — pain points the project explicitly addresses.
articles.content_zh: Browser Use 团队于4月24日在 GitHub 发布 Browser Harness。它移除确定性启发层，将 Chrome 控制权直接交给 LLM，并支持自我纠错和动态新增工具。对于构建竞品监控或网页抓取 agent 的营销团队，该工具专门处理了跨域 iframe、弹窗文件下载等常见卡死场景。
articles.so_what_en: If your browser-automation agents regularly stall on pop-ups or iframes, swap Browser Harness in as a test harness before committing to a heavier framework.
articles.so_what_zh: 若现有 browser agent 频繁卡在弹窗或 iframe，优先用 Browser Harness 做替换测试，再决定框架选型。

articles.title_en: China's 2025 Digital Reading Report: Mobile Wins, AI Reshapes Habits
articles.title_zh: 手机阅读是纸书5倍:泛在阅读时代的内容机会
articles.content_en:
## Background & Numbers
China's 2025 Digital Reading Report finds 80.8% of adults now use digital reading formats, with daily mobile reading at 100.47 minutes, nearly 5x paper book time. Over 60% of users want personalized experiences matched to specific scenarios. Audio books and video book summaries are pulling readers away from long-form text.

## Breakdown
1. **Fragmented scenarios are the entry point** Mobile captures attention in commute, lunch, and pre-sleep slots — brands that own one slot build habitual reach.
2. **Multimodal is the baseline expectation** 60%+ users want format-matched content; audio and video summaries outpace static articles for knowledge intake.
3. **AI rewrites distribution logic** AI-driven personalization now curates what readers see; content without engagement signals loses recommendation visibility fast.

## How to Apply
- [ ] Map your content to 3 daily commute scenarios
- [ ] Repackage one article as a 3-minute audio clip
- [ ] A/B test short video summary vs. long-form post CTR
articles.content_zh:
## 背景与数据
《2025年度中国数字阅读报告》显示，成年国民数字化阅读接触率达80.8%，手机阅读日均100.47分钟，是纸质书的近5倍。超过60%用户希望在不同场景获得个性化内容体验，听书和视频讲书分流明显。

## 问题拆解
1. **碎片场景是流量入口** 通勤、午休、睡前三段各自是独立触点，占据一段即建立习惯性触达。
2. **多模态是用户默认预期** 60%+用户要求场景适配，音频和短视频讲书正在替代纯文字长篇。
3. **AI 重写分发权重** 个性化推荐算法决定内容曝光，缺乏互动信号的内容会快速被降权。

## 你可以怎么用
- [ ] 按通勤/午休/睡前拆分内容格式
- [ ] 将一篇文章改制成3分钟音频
- [ ] A/B 测试视频摘要与长文的 CTR
articles.so_what_en: Own one daily reading slot before competing for all three.
articles.so_what_zh: 先占稳一个场景触点,再谋求多场景覆盖。
